page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.large is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. The memory configuration consists of 4.0 GB of RAM, yielding 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates on the KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates entry-level performance across compute and memory subsystems. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is measured at 1098.39, while the multi-core score reaches 1457.09. Memory bandwidth tests show 81.44 GB/sec for cached small-block reads, dropping to 10.24 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads and 9.37 GB/sec for large-block writes. Geekbench scores reflect this positioning, with a single-core score of 923.0 and a multi-core score of 1096.0.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest resource footprint and lower-tier benchmark results, this server is positioned as a cost-efficient option for lightweight, non-resource-intensive workloads. It is suitable for basic web serving, small-scale Redis caching (achieving 1.45 million SET operations per second), simple text processing, and lightweight development or testing environments. The lack of local storage requires attaching external block storage for persistent data needs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.large is an entry-level, x86_64 architecture server equipped with an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor operating at 2.5 GHz. It features 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) and 4.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Benchmark evaluations place its compute and memory performance in the lower tiers, with a Geekbench single-core score of 923.0 and multi-core score of 1096.0. Due to its dedicated CPU allocation paired with modest resource density, it offers a qualitatively cost-effective solution for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, small Redis deployments, simple text processing, and development environments that do not require high-performance computing or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.large is an entry-level x86_64 server featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight workloads and basic web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.large is an x86_64 server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 4.0 GB RAM, suitable for lightweight web serving and testing.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core entry-level server with a balanced compute-to-memory ratio for lightweight utility workloads and basic web hosting.
bullet_points: Powered by 2 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
Equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
Baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps with KVM virtualization
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for basic web serving, small Redis instances, and testing
